home.subtitle: A vault for music, video, podcasts and films — owned by you, settled on-chain, and stored on Arweave. No middlemen, no platform cut on day one, royalties that follow your work into every wallet it ever touches.
home.why_title: The platform doesn't own your audience.

storage.d: Every upload is permanent on Arweave. If creavault disappears tomorrow, your work doesn't.

royalty.d: EIP-2981 royalties pay you on every secondary sale, in every wallet, forever.

pay.d: USDC, ETH, SOL, or $CREA — buyers choose, creators settle in their preferred token.

owned.t: Owned by the people who use it
owned.d: Listing fees, curation, and treasury are all governed by token holders. No board.

explore.label: The vault
explore.title: Explore
explore.search_placeholder: Search by title, creator, or keyword…

upload.label: New drop
upload.title: Mint a work
upload.subtitle: Your file is uploaded to IPFS, then permanently archived on Arweave. The on-chain record points to both — your work outlives any single host.
upload.desc_placeholder: What is this work? What inspired it? Who is it for?
upload.file_choose: Drop a file or click to choose
upload.file_hint: Up to 4 GB · audio, video, image, pdf, epub
upload.revenue_note: You keep 100% of the first sale and {royalty}% of every resale.

vault.label: Your vault
vault.connect_desc: Your minted works and collected pieces live here, tied to your address — not to a Creavault account.
vault.empty_minted_desc: Upload your first work and it will live here forever, tied to your wallet.
vault.empty_collected_desc: Browse the vault and collect a work to see it here.

token.label: $CREA · the protocol token
token.subtitle: 100M CREA, minted once, never again. Every protocol fee buys CREA back from the open market and burns it — until 20M, the permanent floor. Stakers earn ETH, not freshly-minted bags.

common.not_found_desc: The work you're looking for may have been moved, removed, or never existed. The vault keeps what matters — this wasn't it.
